display.purpose: Case-study titles; the largest type the system uses. Regola Neue 500 at 48px.

headline.purpose: Subheadings (h4, .largetext). Light weight at 24px is the visual signature.

title.purpose: Hero tagline and primary intro paragraphs.

body.purpose: Default paragraph copy at weight 100. Test contrast every time.

label.purpose: Card titles, descriptions, pill nav, section-nav links.

shadows.name: pill-float
shadows.purpose: Fixed pill nav. Soft ambient — almost invisible.

shadows.name: pill-tab-active
shadows.purpose: Active tab inside the pill nav.

motion.name: duration-long
motion.purpose: Per-card glow cover transition on hover.

components.name: Pill Nav
components.description: Fixed top-right nav with a sliding active-tab indicator. The signature shell element.
components.html:
WorkAbout
LinkedInEmail me
components.css: .ds-pill-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 100px; padding: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; } .ds-pill-slider { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 100px; padding: 3px; gap: 2px; } .ds-pill-tab { padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #5a5a5a; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-pill-tab-active { background: #ffffff; color: #141218; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); } .ds-pill-sep { width: 1px; height: 18px; background: #e0e0e0; margin: 0 4px; } .ds-pill-btn { padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 100px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #5a5a5a; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-pill-btn:hover { background: #f0f0f0; color: #141218; } .ds-pill-btn:focus-visible, .ds-pill-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3478ff; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 100px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Index project card with hover MP4 preview and per-card colored glow. The conversion gate to a case study.
components.html:
Terraform Remediation Agent

In BetaProduct Design

Shaping an agentic remediation workflow that turns detected infrastructure issues into safe, reviewable PRs.

Outcome: In private beta · agentic remediation, end-to-end
components.css: .ds-project-card-link { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; } .ds-project-card { position: relative; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; color: #141218; } .ds-project-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -30px; border-radius: 28px; background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(236,72,153,0.5), rgba(251,182,215,0.3), rgba(236,72,153,0.5)); filter: blur(28px); z-index: -1; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.7s ease; } .ds-project-card:hover::before { opacity: 0.55; } .ds-card-img { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0; aspect-ratio: 2224 / 1796; } .ds-card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; object-fit: cover; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 20px 16px 16px; } .ds-card-header-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-header-row h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; margin: 0; flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-header-row .ds-card-tags { justify-content: flex-end; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 14px; color: #5a5a5a; margin: 0; } .ds-card-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-tag-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; color: #5a5a5a; background: #ffffff; } .ds-tag-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tag-dot-orange { background: #FDBB2D; } .ds-tag-dot-purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #92BFFE 0%, #EE84F5 50%, #B978FF 100%); } .ds-card-outcome { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #141218; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-outcome strong { font-weight: 600; margin-right: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Project-status pill with a 7px colored dot indicator. Always paired with a tag-dot color (green=shipped, orange=in-progress, purple-gradient=discipline).
components.html: Shipped · 2025 Product Design
components.css: .ds-tag-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 100px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; color: #5a5a5a; background: #ffffff; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; } .ds-tag-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tag-dot-green { background: #58A942; } .ds-tag-dot-purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #92BFFE 0%, #EE84F5 50%, #B978FF 100%); } .ds-tag-dot-orange { background: #FDBB2D; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The default ghost-style button. No filled chromatic CTA exists in this system.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #131316; color: #131316; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 16px; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease-in, transform 0.1s ease-in; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f0f0f0; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3478ff; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Card Outcome
components.description: Outcome paragraph below the card description, leading with a bold 'Outcome:' label. Replaced the older 'Learn more →' pill — the whole card is already a link, so the footer slot was never doing any work. Carries shipped-outcome signal under the description instead.
components.html: Outcome: First-class recovery for an irreversible delete
components.css: .ds-card-outcome { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #141218; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; } .ds-card-outcome strong { font-weight: 600; margin-right: 2px; }

components.name: Section Nav
components.description: Case-study left-rail scrollspy. Seven fixed sections: Context, Problem, Research, Ideation, Solution, Prototype, Conclusion.
components.html:
1. Context
  2. Problem
  3. Research
  4. Ideation
  5. Solution
  6. Prototype
  7. Conclusion
components.css: .ds-section-nav { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 100; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; } .ds-section-nav ol { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; } .ds-section-nav a { display: block; padding: 8px 0; color: #8E8E93; text-decoration: none; transition: color 50ms ease-in-out; } .ds-section-nav a:hover, .ds-section-nav a:focus-visible { color: #131316; outline: none; } .ds-section-nav-active > a { color: #131316; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Time Pill
components.description: Real-time clock with a time-of-day emoji. Signature personality element in the header. Specific to Ishaan; do not abstract.
components.css: .ds-time-container { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Regola Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #5a5a5a; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 100px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; } .ds-time-icon { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; }

narrative.overview:
A senior product designer's reading room. The site reads like a printed dossier: a tight content column, a near-monochrome page, generous interior whitespace, and personality carried by a few specific objects — the halftoneface logo, the halftone globe canvas, the time-of-day emoji, the draggable polaroids on About. Everything else stays out of the way of the writing.

The system is built around the case-study reading experience. Senior hiring managers open one case study to evaluate craft and leveling signal; the shell exists to get them there and the body exists to be read. Restraint is the voice: hairline borders, a single signal-blue accent, no decorative gradients in copy, no shadows under headings. The visual quietness is what lets the writing register as senior.

This system explicitly rejects: Y2K / brutalist / maximalist designer-showcase aesthetics; generic Webflow / Framer dark-hero templates with reflexive scroll-reveal cadence; the SaaS landing-page formula (hero metric + gradient + blue CTA); the editorial-magazine aesthetic of italic display serif + drop caps + ruled three-column grids when there's no editorial reason to use it.
keyCharacteristics: One content column, 1160px max, anchored to every page (--page-max)
Near-monochrome palette: white page, near-black ink, one Signal Blue accent
Brand accents (Terraform Purple, Packer Cyan) appear only inside the relevant case studies
Self-hosted Regola Neue across the system; Tiempos Fine reserved for italic display moments
Flat by default; soft ambient shadows only on floating elements (pill nav, lightbox)
Per-card colored glow on hover as the one piece of decorative motion in the index grid

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is the only chromatic color in the shell. The shell is index + About + nav + footer. Case studies may introduce their product's brand accent (Terraform Purple, Packer Cyan) inside their own page, but those accents do not leak back into the shell. If a third chromatic color shows up in the shell, the rule is broken.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are 1px or 1.5px, in Drafting Line (#e0e0e0). No 2px+ borders. No colored stripes on the left or right of cards or callouts. If a card needs more presence, give it a soft shadow on hover or interior padding, not a heavier border.

rules.name: The Brand-Scoped Color Rule
rules.body: Terraform Purple and Packer Cyan are scoped to their case studies. Mixing them on the same page (the index) is forbidden; that's the company's marketing site's job, not a personal portfolio's.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Regola Neue carries every UI surface. Tiempos Fine is permitted only for italic display moments and only when a paragraph needs to register editorially. Do not pair a second sans-serif (no Inter, no DM Sans, no Plus Jakarta). A single well-chosen family carrying every weight is the design choice.

rules.name: The Light-Weight-At-Body Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs use Regola 100. This is the single most fragile call in the system. Test in browser at every change; if contrast even feels close, the answer is to darken the ink, never to bump the weight.

rules.name: The Smart-Quotes Rule
rules.body: HTML entities (‘ / ’ / – / — / ·) carry typographic punctuation. Straight quotes are forbidden in shipped copy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Headings, body, cards at rest, sections, and dividers have no shadow. If a designer adds a shadow under a heading 'for hierarchy,' they're solving the wrong problem; the answer is type weight or whitespace.

rules.name: The Float-Only Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are reserved for elements that genuinely float (fixed nav, active state inside that nav, modal lightbox). A card at rest does not float; it sits.

dos: Do use the --page-max: 1160px content column on every new page. The shared column is what holds the system together.
Do anchor the pill nav and the section-nav to --page-gutter so they align with the content column at every screen width.
Do keep Signal Blue (#3478FF) as the one chromatic accent in the shell. Use it for links and focus rings only.
Do declare hover MP4s with <link rel="prefetch"> in the page head. Never preload — it competes with initial render.
Do test new copy at every breakpoint. Long headline words plus the 48px display scale will overflow narrow grids; reduce the clamp or rewrite the copy.
Do match Regola weight 100 for body, 300 for h4, 400 for labels, 500 for hero/cta, 600 for h3. Do not invent in-between weights.
Do use HTML entities for typographic punctuation (‘, –, ·).
Do carry the seven-section flow (Context → Problem → Research → Ideation → Solution → Prototype → Conclusion) on every case study.
Do ship a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternative for every animation — hover MP4s, the halftone globe, polaroids, scroll-spy.
donts: Don't drift into Y2K / brutalist / maximalist designer-showcase aesthetics. The audience is senior hiring managers, not Awwwards judges.
Don't ship anything that reads as a generic Webflow / Framer template — no templated dark hero, no reflexive scroll-reveals on every section, no Inter as a 'safe' pairing.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, callouts, or alerts. Banned.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Banned.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section. One named kicker as a deliberate brand system is voice; an eyebrow on every section is AI grammar.
Don't scaffold sections with 01 / 02 / 03 markers unless the section actually IS a sequence that the reader needs to follow in order.
Don't introduce a second sans-serif. Regola Neue covers every UI surface. Tiempos Fine is the only paired family, and only in italic display moments.
Don't lighten Marginalia Gray (#5A5A5A). It sits at the 4.5:1 contrast floor; one shade lighter fails AA.
Don't add shadows under headings, cards-at-rest, sections, or dividers. Flat by default.
Don't let Terraform Purple or Packer Cyan leak out of their case studies into the shell.

Don't add a 'Layout Principles' or 'Motion' top-level section to this file when it changes. Fold new rules into Overview (philosophy) or Components (per-component behavior). The six section names are fixed.
